title: arachnorchis longicauda subsp. merrittii
intro: Arachnorchis longicauda subsp. merrittii, also known as Merritt's spider orchid, is a rare and critically endangered Australian orchid species. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its use in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant has been used to promote health and wellbeing, with potential benefits including reduced stress, improved cardiovascular health, and enhanced immune function. Arachnorchis longicauda subsp. merrittii has been traditionally prepared as a tea or tincture, although commercial preparations are not widely available due to the plant's limited distribution and conservation status.
